parentChangeId.description: The id of the last change made to this application element. This can be retrieved from the response for any app element modification endpoint.

propertyUpdates.description: Edits to be applied to the element's metadata.

returnError.description: If true, errors in request processing will be returned in a 200 response with a meaningful description. Otherwise, errors will result in a relevant HTTP error response.

returnJsonDifferenceFormat.description: If specified, and jsonTreeEdit is non-empty, the json difference will be returned in this format, otherwise no json difference will be returned.

BTAssemblyFeatureInfo.description: List of Assembly features including those are created by replicates.

BTAssemblyInstanceInfo.description: List of instances including those created by patterns and replicates.

featureId.description: The ID of the assembly mate feature.

mateName.description: The name of the assembly mate feature.

BTAssemblyMateValueInfo.description: Quantities for length are specified in meters, and quantities for angles are specified in radians.

mateValues.description: Describes the relative position of the first mate connector with respect to the second along the designated degrees of freedom (DOF) for mates in the specified assembly.

BTAssemblyMateValuesInfo.description: Get a list of mate values for all the mates of a specified assembly.

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

items.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

seedToPatternInstances.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

featureId.description: Unique ID of the feature instance within this Part Studio.

featureType.description: The name of the feature spec that this feature instantiates.

importMicroversion.description: Element microversion that is being imported.

namespace.description: Indicates where the feature definition lives. Features in the FeatureScript standard library have a namespace value of `""`. Custom features identify the Feature Studio that contains the definition.

returnAfterSubfeatures.description: For internal use only. Should always be `false`.

subFeatures.description: List of subfeatures belonging to the feature.

suppressed.description: If `true`, the feature is suppressed. It will skip regeneration, denoted by a line through the name in the Feature list.

suppressionConfigured.description: `true` if the suppression is configured in the Part Studio.

variableStudioReference.description: If `true`, the feature references a Variable Studio.

occurrencesToExport.description: IDs of the occurrences to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple instances (example: occurrencesToExport=JHK,JHD).

cloudObjectId.description: Folder id where to store the exported model.

cloudStorageAccountId.description: Account id to access the cloud storage.

BTBCloudStorageOptions.description: Options for exporting elements to cloud storage.

additionalProperties.description: Other entity creation or modification parameters.

otherFields.description: Other entity creation or modification parameters.

BTBDrawingOperationParams.description: A single drawing entity creation or modification definition

emailLink.description: Use `true` if a link in an email should be sent.

emailMessage.description: Message to send in the email body along with the download link.

emailSubject.description: Subject to send the email with.
emailSubject.default: User sent you a file exported from Onshape

emailTo.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

items.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

fromUserId.description: Id of the user who does the export.

password.description: A password to protect the email with.

passwordRequired.description: Use `true` if the email should be protected with a password.

sendCopyToMe.description: Use `true` if email copy should be sent to the user who does the export.

validForDays.description: Number of days to keep the link valid for.

BTBEmailExportOptions.description: Options for exporting elements as a link in an email.

configuration.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

elementIds.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

items.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

evaluateExportRule.description: Set to `true` to evaluate the export rule for the given `formatName` and to include an `exportRuleFileName` value in the response.

ignoreExportRulesForContents.description: For multiple elements export, use `true` if export rule shouldn't be applied for all elements.

linkDocumentId.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

linkDocumentWorkspaceId.description: The id of the workspace through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

partIds.description: IDs of the parts to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple parts (example: partIds=JHK,JHD).

angularTolerance.description: Determines the maximum angular deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

distanceTolerance.description: Determines the maximum distance deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

maximumChordLength.description: Determines the maximum of a triangle edge length. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

BTBExportMeshParams.description: Options for an element export to mesh format.

emailTo.description: Base64-encoded email address. When sending an email, the `fromUserId` parameter is also required.

excludeHiddenEntities.description: If `true`, the exported file won't have any parts and assemblies marked as hidden

flatPatternAsync.description: If `true`, flat pattern export being called via async

fromUserId.description: Your user ID. Required when providing the `emailTo` parameter.

useYAxisAsUp.description: If `true`, the exported file will have all the parts and assemblies reoriented such that the Z-axis within Onshape becomes the Y-axis in the exported file.

destinationName.description: The name of the exported file.

excludeHiddenEntities.description: Whether or not to exclude hidden parts from export.

grouping.description: Whether parts should be exported as a group or individually in a .zip file.

includeExportIds.description: Whether topology ids should be exported as parasolid attributes.

isYAxisUp.description: Rotate model from Z-axis-up orientation to Y-axis-up.

notifyUser.description: Send notification to the user client.

storeInDocument.description: Create a blob with exported file in the source document.

admin.description: Indicates the user is an admin if true.

email.description: Email ID of the company user.

globalPermissions.description:
List of global permissions to grant. See [Onshape Help: Global Permissions](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/global_permissions.htm#Assignin) for details on each of the available permissions. 
 * `0`: Manage role based access control 
 * `1`: Manage users, teams, and aliases 
 * `2`: Enterprise administrator 
 * `3`: Permanently delete 
 * `4`: Analytics administrator 
 * `5`: Invite guest users 
 * `6`: Create projects 
 * `7`: Approve releases 
 * `8`: Enable link sharing 
 * `9`: Create releases 
 * `10`: Allow access to the App Store 
 * `11`: Create documents and folders in the Enterprise root 
 * `12`: Allow access to public documents 
 * `17`: Manage non-geometric items 
 * `18`: Manage workflows 
 * `19`: Transfer documents out of Enterprise 
 * `20`: Sync to Arena 
 * `21`: Create tasks 
 * `22`: Manage standard content metadata 
 * `23`: Workspace protection permissions 
 * `24`: Import files 
 * `25`: Use revision tools  * `26`: Export files

items.description:
List of global permissions to grant. See [Onshape Help: Global Permissions](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/Plans/global_permissions.htm#Assignin) for details on each of the available permissions. 
 * `0`: Manage role based access control 
 * `1`: Manage users, teams, and aliases 
 * `2`: Enterprise administrator 
 * `3`: Permanently delete 
 * `4`: Analytics administrator 
 * `5`: Invite guest users 
 * `6`: Create projects 
 * `7`: Approve releases 
 * `8`: Enable link sharing 
 * `9`: Create releases 
 * `10`: Allow access to the App Store 
 * `11`: Create documents and folders in the Enterprise root 
 * `12`: Allow access to public documents 
 * `17`: Manage non-geometric items 
 * `18`: Manage workflows 
 * `19`: Transfer documents out of Enterprise 
 * `20`: Sync to Arena 
 * `21`: Create tasks 
 * `22`: Manage standard content metadata 
 * `23`: Workspace protection permissions 
 * `24`: Import files 
 * `25`: Use revision tools  * `26`: Export files

guest.description: Indicates the user is a guest user if true.

light.description: Indicates the user is a light user if true.

libraryVersion.description: FeatureScript version used in the Part Studio. Do not modify.

microversionSkew.description: On output, `true` indicates a microversion mismatch was encountered.

rejectMicroversionSkew.description: If `true`, the call will refuse to make the addition if the current microversion for the document does not match the source microversion. If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

sourceMicroversion.description: The state from which the result was extracted. Geometry ID interpretation is dependent on this document microversion.

libraryVersion.description: FeatureScript version used in the Part Studio. Do not modify.

microversionSkew.description: On output, `true` indicates a microversion mismatch was encountered.

rejectMicroversionSkew.description: If `true`, the call will refuse to make the addition if the current microversion for the document does not match the source microversion. If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

sourceMicroversion.description: The state from which the result was extracted. Geometry ID interpretation is dependent on this document microversion.

configurationParameterId.description: The configuration parameter configuring this value, if configured

additionalProperties.description: Configuration to value, required if configuration parameter id is specified

configurationToValue.description: Configuration to value, required if configuration parameter id is specified

isPublic.description: `true` to make the new document public.

ownerId.description: Owner of the new document. Can be a [user ID](#/User/sessionInfo) or [company ID](#/Company/findCompany), depending on `ownerTypeIndex`.

parentId.description: Optionally add the new document to the specified folder. Provide the folder ID as the parent ID.

projectId.description: Optionally add the new document to the specified project.

repointAppElementVersionRefs.description: `true` to re-point version references in application elements to the initial version in the new document.

BTCopyDocumentParams.description: Options for the new copied document.

companyId.description: Id of the company that owns the task.

documentId.description: Id of a document to associate the task to.

itemParams.description: References to include in the task.

value.description: The unit that should be used.

BTDefaultUnitInfo.description: Specifies which unit should be used for each supported quantity type.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

id.description: The ID of the view feature.

isOnshapeDefault.description: `True` if this display state is in all assemblies by default; `false` if the display state is user-created.

name.description: The name of the view feature.

elements.description: The elements (tabs) in the document. This does not include folders.

BTDocumentElementCreationDescriptor.description: List of element IDs to include in the document.

restoreId.description: If this microversion is the result of a restore from another microversion, the restoreId will be the microversion Id of the original microversion that was restored. Otherwise this id will not be included within the response.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

elements.description: List of element IDs to include in the document.

forceExportRules.description: `true` if the current user can toggle the Force Export Rule flag on a document.

isEmptyContent.description: Set to `true` to generate an empty document.

isPublic.description: Set to `true` to make the document public.

notRevisionManaged.description: Set to `true` to indicate that revisions are not managed for this document.

ownerId.description: If `ownerType=USER`, this is the user ID. If `ownerType=COMPANY`, this is the company ID.

parentId.description: Document ID of this document's parent.

projectId.description: ID of the project this document belongs to.

tags.description: Array of strings to set as tags for the document.

items.description: Array of strings to set as tags for the document.

BTDocumentParams.description: Parameters for creating and updating documents.

documentFilter.description: Type of documents to search: `0: My Documents | 1: Created | 2: Shared | 3: Trash | 4: Public | 5: Recent | 6: By Owner | 7: By Company | 9: By Team`

limit.description: Number of results to return per page. Default value is 20 (also the maximum).

offset.description: Offset. Determines where search results begin. Default value is 0.

ownerId.description: Owner ID. Can be a user ID, company ID, or team ID, depending on `ownerType`.

rawQuery.description: Search for documents that contain the given string in the name. Search is not case-sensitive.

sortColumn.description: Column by which to sort search results. `name | modifiedAt | createdAt (default) | email | modifiedBy | promotedAt`

sortOrder.description: Type of documents to search: `0: My Documents | 1: Created | 2: Shared | 3: Trash | 4: Public | 5: Recent | 6: By Owner | 7: By Company | 9: By Team`

type.description: Type of owner. `0: User | 1: Company | 2: Onshape`. If the owner is a teamId, leave this unspecified.

description.description: The label that will appear in the document's edit history for this operation. If blank, a value will be auto-generated.

border.description: Set to `true` to include a border in the drawing.

computeIntersection.description: Set to `true` to compute and display virtual edges (curves drawn where parts intersect). Leave as `false` to improve performance.

displayStateId.description: Apply this display state's properties to the drawing.

documentId.description: The document in which to create the drawing. If used, this value must match the document ID (`did`) value provided in the URL.

documentMicroversionId.description: Create a drawing of a part or assembly from this microversion.

drawingName.description: Provide a name for the drawing.

elementConfiguration.description: Apply this configuration from the source element to the drawing.

elementId.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

elementMicroversionId.description: The id of the element microversion in which to perform the operation.

explosionId.description: Apply this exploded view to the drawing.

externalDocumentId.description: Create a drawing of an element from this external document.

externalDocumentVersionId.description: Create a drawing of an element from this external document version.

includeSurfaces.description: Set to `true` to include surfaces in the drawing.

includeWires.description: Set to `true` to include wires in the drawing.

isFlattenedPart.description: Set to `true` if creating a drawing from a flattened part.

isSketchOnly.description: Set to `true` if creating a drawing of a sketch.

isSurface.description: Set to `true` if creating a drawing from a surface.

language.description: Set the language for the drawing. Accepts any ISO 639-1 standard language code.

modelType.description: The type of model to include in the drawing: `partstudio` | `assembly`

namedPositionId.description: Apply this named view to the drawing.

numberHorizontalZones.description: The number of horizontal zones to include in the drawing's graphics area.

numberVerticalZones.description: The number of vertical zones to include in the drawing's graphics area.

partId.description: Include this part in the drawing.

partNumber.description: Include this part in the drawing.

partQuery.description: Include all parts found by the query in the drawing.

projection.description: Apply this projection to the drawing.

pureSketch.description: Set to `true` if creating the drawing of an empty sketch.

referenceType.description: Specify the type of element to create the drawing from. `0: UNKNOWN` | `1: PARTSTUDIO` | `2: ASSEMBLY` | `3: PART` | `4: FLATTENED_PART` | `5: COMPOSITE_PART` | `6: MESH_PART` | `7: SURFACE` | `8: SKETCH` | `9: CURVE`

revision.description: Create the drawing from this specific revision.

showCutGeomOnly.description: Set to `true` to show only cut geometry in the drawing.

size.description: Provide a size for the drawing.

sketchIds.description: Include these sketches in the drawing.

items.description: Include these sketches in the drawing.

standard.description: Provide the Standard to use in the drawing.

startZones.description: The zone in which to start the drawing.

templateArgs.description: Provide any additional arguments for the template being used for this drawing.

items.description: Provide any additional arguments for the template being used for this drawing.

templateDocumentId.description: Apply the template from this document to the drawing.

templateElementId.description: Apply the template from this element to the drawing.

templateName.description: Apply this template to the drawing.

templateVersionId.description: Apply the template from this version to the drawing.

templateWorkspaceId.description: Apply the template from this workspace to the drawing.

titleblock.description: Set to `true` to include a title block in the drawing.

views.description: Add these views to the drawing.

workspaceId.description: Create a drawing of a part or assembly from this workspace.

BTDrawingParams.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a drawing.

groups.description: List of folders or elements in this group (folder).

nodeId.description: A unique identifier for this folder.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

libraryDefinitionId.description: The ID of the definition of the element library.

libraryId.description: The Id of the library -- unique across Onshape.

libraryVersion.description: The current version Id of the library.

ownerId.description: The owner Id of an element library (either Onshape, company, or user).

ownerType.description: The type of library owner, Onshape, user, or company

sourceFolderId.description: The id of the root folder of the library

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

elementId.description: The id of an element which provides context for the position value specified.

position.description: An indicator for the relative placement of the new element. If elementId is specified, a negative number indicates insertion prior to the element and a non-negative number indicates insertion following the element. If no elementId is specified, a negative value indicates insertion at the end of the element list and a non-negative number indicates insertion at the start of the element list.

BTElementLocationParams.description: The location at which the new element should be inserted.

closed.description: If type == COMPOSITE, indicates whether it is open or closed.

items.description: If type == COMPOSITE, this is the id of a constituent that can be found in the 'bodies' array.

consumedByComposite.description: Indicates if there is a closed composite that consumes this body.

appearancePropertyNodeId.description: Identifies the application of the appearance. Faces that share a value were assigned an appearance together.

microversionSkew.description: On output, `true` indicates a microversion mismatch was encountered.

rejectMicroversionSkew.description: If `true`, the call will refuse to make the addition if the current microversion for the document does not match the source microversion. If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

BTJEdit-3734.description: An edit that will be applied to the application element's json data.

BTJEditChange-2636.description: Change the value of a node.
BTJEditChange-2636.example: In the structure { 'stringKey': 'bar', 'arrayKey': [ 1, 2, 3 ], 'objectKey': { 'subKey': false } } to change 'bar' to 'baz', specify { 'btType': 'BTJEditChange-2636', 'path': { 'btType': 'BTJPath-3073', 'startNode': '', 'path': [ { 'btType': 'BTJPathKey-3221', 'key': 'stringKey' } ] }, 'value': 'baz' }

BTJEditDelete-1992.example: In the structure { 'stringKey': 'bar', 'arrayKey': [ 1, 2, 3 ], 'objectKey': { 'subKey': false } } to delete the 'stringKey' node, specify { 'btType' : 'BTJEditDelete-1992', 'path': { 'btType': 'BTJPath-3073', 'startNode': '', 'path': [ { 'btType': 'BTJPathKey-3221', 'key': 'stringKey' } ] } }

BTJEditInsert-2523.description: Inserts a value using the specified path.
BTJEditInsert-2523.example: In the structure { 'stringKey': 'bar', 'arrayKey': [ 1, 2, 3 ], 'objectKey': { 'subKey': false } } to insert 4 at the end of 'arrayKey', specify { 'btType': 'BTJEditInsert-2523', 'path': { 'btType': 'BTJPath-3073', 'startNode': '', 'path': [ { 'btType': 'BTJPathKey-3221', 'key': 'arrayKey' }, { 'btType': 'BTJPathIndex-1871', 'index': -1 } ] }, 'value': 4 }

BTJEditList-2707.description: A list of edits that will be applied in order.

BTJEditMove-3245.description: Move an existing node from one path to another.
BTJEditMove-3245.example: In the structure { 'stringKey': 'bar', 'arrayKey': [ 1, 2, 3 ], 'objectKey': { 'subKey': false } } to move the third value out of 'arrayKey' and into its own node, specify { 'btType': 'BTJEditMove-3245', 'sourcePath': { 'btType': 'BTJPath-3073', 'startNode': '', 'path': [ { 'btType': 'BTJPathKey-3221', 'key': 'arrayKey' }, { 'btType': 'BTJPathIndex-1871', 'index': 2 } ] }, 'destinationPath': { 'btType': 'BTJPath-3073', 'startNode': '', 'path': [ { 'btType': 'BTJPathKey-3221', 'key': 'newKey' } ] } }

startNode.description: Either empty (root) or the nodeId of a node in the tree.

BTJPath-3073.description: Identifies a value in the json data to be operated upon.

BTJPathElement-2297.description: Identifies a node in the json structure, beginning at the specified startNode.

BTJPathIndex-1871.description: Identifies a value in a json array. For insert and move edit destinations, -1 can be used to indicate 'end'.

BTJPathKey-3221.description: Identifies a subtree of the json structure by field name.

additionalProperties.description:
`0: AUTOMATIC` Set automatically, like a part name | 
`1: MERGED` Merged from another Part Studio | `2: FEATURE` Custom feature | `3: UNCONFIGURED` | `4: CONFIGURED` | 
`5: STANDARD_CONTENT` | `6: DEFAULT` Applied from metadata property configuration | `7: COMPUTED` Non-overridden, non-configured, computed property | 
`8: COMPUTED_CONFIGURED` Property is computed in this configuration; may also be configured in other configurations 
`9: IMPORT` Imported properties are handled separately

propertySourceTypes.description:
`0: AUTOMATIC` Set automatically, like a part name | 
`1: MERGED` Merged from another Part Studio | `2: FEATURE` Custom feature | `3: UNCONFIGURED` | `4: CONFIGURED` | 
`5: STANDARD_CONTENT` | `6: DEFAULT` Applied from metadata property configuration | `7: COMPUTED` Non-overridden, non-configured, computed property | 
`8: COMPUTED_CONFIGURED` Property is computed in this configuration; may also be configured in other configurations 
`9: IMPORT` Imported properties are handled separately

libraryVersion.description: FeatureScript version used in the Part Studio. Do not modify.

microversionSkew.description: On output, `true` indicates a microversion mismatch was encountered.

rejectMicroversionSkew.description: If `true`, the call will refuse to make the addition if the current microversion for the document does not match the source microversion. If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

sourceMicroversion.description: The state from which the result was extracted. Geometry ID interpretation is dependent on this document microversion.

BTShadedViewsInfo.description: Images are returned as base64-encoded strings.

category.description: Category for the corresponding standard content.

class.description: Class for the corresponding standard content.

component.description: Component for the corresponding standard content.

id.description: Document ID for the corresponding standard content.

standard.description: Standard for the corresponding standard content.

BTStandardContentHierarchyItem.description: Describes a single instance of standard content.

BTStandardContentParameterIdAndValue.description: Parameters that drive configuration. Used to specify the standard content component to which the custom parameter values are associated.

BTStandardContentPropertyIdAndValue.description: Non-driving custom parameters whose values are to be set.

customParameters.description: Non-driving custom parameters whose values are to be set.

parameters.description: Parameters that drive configuration. Used to specify the standard content component to which the custom parameter values are associated.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParameterSpeci.description: Specifies a standard content component along with the custom properties whose values are to be set.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParametersErro.description: Indicates whether or not the individual request had an error.

errorMessage.description: If there was an error, this provides a more detailed description of the problem.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParametersResp.description: Reports the status of an individual request to set custom parameter values.

features.description: List of Assembly features including those are created by replicates.

instances.description: List of instances including those created by patterns and replicates.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

bodyType.description: Body type to reference from a task.

configuration.description: Configuration of reference. Used to restrict a reference to a specific configuration of an element.

documentId.description: Id of a document. Required to reference a document or anything contained within it.

elementId.description: Id of an element reference. Used when referencing an element.

elementType.description: Type of element reference. Options are 0 (Part Studio), 1 (Assembly), 2 (Drawing), 3 (Feature Studio), 4 (Blob), 5 (Application), 6 (Table), 7 (Bill of Materials),  8 (Variable Studio), or 9 (Publication Item).

mimeType.description: Mimetype of reference. Used when referencing blob elements.

partId.description: Deterministic Id of a part. Used when referencing parts.

revisionId.description: Id of a revision to reference from a task.

versionId.description: Id of a document version. Used when referencing the version itself or an element or part in it.

workspaceId.description: Id of a document workspace. Used when referencing the workspace itself or an element or part in it.

BTTaskItemParams.description: References to add to the task.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

allowFaultyParts.description: If true, parts with faults are imported. If false, faulty parts are omitted.

angularTolerance.description: Determines the maximum angular deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

annotationsFontHeightInMillimeters.description: Determines the font size in workspace units used for the MBD annotations text export

cloudObjectId.description: Folder id where to store the exported model.

cloudStorageAccountId.description: Account id to access the cloud storage.

configuration.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

destinationName.description: The name of the exported file.

distanceTolerance.description: Determines the maximum distance deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

elementId.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

elementIds.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

items.description: An array of element ids for multi-element export.

emailLink.description: Use `true` if a link in an email should be sent.

emailMessage.description: Message to send in the email body along with the download link.

emailSubject.description: Subject to send the email with.

emailTo.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

items.description: List of email addresses to send the email to.

evaluateExportRule.description: Set to `true` to evaluate the export rule for the given `formatName` and to include an `exportRuleFileName` value in the response.

excludeHiddenEntities.description: Whether or not to exclude hidden parts from export.

formatName.description: The name of the file format.

fromUserId.description: Id of the user who does the export.

grouping.description: Whether parts should be exported as a group or individually in a .zip file.

ignoreExportRulesForContents.description: For multiple elements export, use `true` if export rule shouldn't be applied for all elements.

includeExportIds.description: Whether topology ids should be exported as parasolid attributes.

linkDocumentId.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

linkDocumentWorkspaceId.description: The id of the workspace through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

maximumChordLength.description: Determines the maximum of a triangle edge length. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

notifyUser.description: Send notification to the user client.

occurrencesToExport.description: IDs of the occurrences to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple instances (example: occurrencesToExport=JHK,JHD).

partIds.description: IDs of the parts to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple parts (example: partIds=JHK,JHD).

password.description: A password to protect the email with.

passwordRequired.description: Use `true` if the email should be protected with a password.

resolution.description: Determines export resolution of fine, medium, or coarse

sendCopyToMe.description: Use `true` if email copy should be sent to the user who does the export.

storeInDocument.description: Create a blob with exported file in the source document.

validForDays.description: Number of days to keep the link valid for.

versionString.description: Parasolid version number as string. Use '0' for the latest.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

exportRuleFileName.description: The file name after evaluating a rule for the given `formatName`. `NULL` if `evaluateExportRule=false` or if the export rule is not found.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

additionalProperties.description: Specifies the display precision for every supported unit.

unitsDisplayPrecision.description: Specifies the display precision for every supported unit.

If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

sourceMicroversion.description: The state from which the result was extracted. Geometry ID interpretation is dependent on this document microversion.
